# Toy Box

**[STUB]** Created from live event text; verify against wiki/source when available.

## Description

Upon pickup, obtain 4 Wax Relics. Every 3 combats, your left-most Wax Relic will melt away.

## Notes

### Obtaining Toy Box

At the start of Act 2, can be offered by Tezcatara.

## Strategy Notes

- Temporary relic value is high-variance; prefer more reliable Tezcatara options when the deck needs a specific Act 2 plan or boss answer.
